base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of anakaris — a character from 1994 darkstalkers. Anakaris — Egyptian pharaoh mummy. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Anakaris — Egyptian pharaoh mummy; stretch-arm curses
